title: Nutty Green Beans
excerpt: Nutty butter green beans: Ingredients: 750 g fresh green beans 50 g unsalted butter Grated zest of one lemon 40 g roasted hazelnuts 25g finely chopped dates Method: Cook the beans quickly for 4 or 5 minutes in boiling water. Drain well Mix the butter with the lemon, nuts and …
html:
Nutty butter green beans:

 

Ingredients:

  • 750 g fresh green beans
  • 50 g unsalted butter
  • Grated zest of one lemon
  • 40 g roasted hazelnuts
  • 25g finely chopped dates

 

Method:

  • Cook the beans quickly for 4 or 5 minutes in boiling water.
  • Drain well
  • Mix the butter with the lemon, nuts and dates.
  • Mix the butter with the beans.

 

The flavoured butter can be made a week ahead of time.
